message:
chore: audit batch 400 — deep code exploration (7 files, ~15,495L, 7 bugs)

Deep fresh-eyes audit with execution flow tracing:
- transport/aggregator.rs (3782L): SOUND — multipath symbol aggregation
- epoch.rs (3010L): SOUND — epoch coordination primitives
- time/driver.rs (1772L): SOUND — timer wheel driver
- compiler.rs (1309L): FIXED — 2 bugs (pattern overlap, int division)
- explain.rs (448L): FIXED — 1 bug (NaN-unsafe PartialEq)
- control.rs (3309L): 4 bugs reported to BlackMeadow (CRDT delta sentinel, frontier advance, unbounded growth)
- service.rs (1865L): SOUND — obligation tracking

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
